description.comments: In the permissionDetails object you will find the following properties:

permissionDetails.resourceGroupName: The resource group name where the resource is located
permissionDetails.resourceIdToAddAccessTo: The resource ID of the resource you want to grant access to
permissionDetails.ObjectIdToGrantAccess: The object ID of the principal you want to grant access to
permissionDetails.roleDefinitionObjectId: The object ID of the role definition you want to grant access to

resources.comments: Grants permissions to the resourceId provdied for the principal ID provided
resources.name: [concat('addPermissionFor-', parameters('permissionDetails') [copyIndex()].roleDefinitionObjectId)]
